title: Former NBA Player Damon Jones in Gambling Trouble
summary: Damon Jones, a former NBA player, is expected to plead guilty in a big gambling case. He was arrested with over 30 people, including other basketball figures and mobsters. Jones is accused of cheating in poker games and sharing secret injury information about star players like LeBron James to help people win bets. He had said he was not guilty before but now might change his plea in court. Jones played basketball for many years and earned a lot of money. He was a teammate of LeBron James and later helped coach him. Prosecutors say he texted someone to bet on a game because he knew James was hurt, even though it wasn't public yet. This case shows how gambling can lead to serious legal problems for athletes.

background_read: This article is about a former NBA player, Damon Jones, who got into trouble for gambling. Gambling means betting money on sports or games, and it can be illegal if done in certain ways. Jones is accused of cheating in poker and telling people secret information about injuries to help them win bets. He played basketball for many teams and was friends with famous players like LeBron James. Now, he might admit he did wrong in court, which could have serious consequences like fines or jail time. This story teaches us about the importance of following rules in sports and avoiding illegal activities.
Article_Structure: WHO: Damon Jones, a former NBA player and assistant coach.
WHAT: He is expected to plead guilty to charges related to gambling, including rigged poker games and sharing secret injury information.
WHERE: The case is in Brooklyn federal court in New York.
WHY: To address illegal gambling activities that involved cheating and insider information, showing the legal risks for athletes.

perspectives.description: Focuses on the court case and charges against Jones for breaking gambling laws.
Looks at how this affects basketball and the reputation of players involved.
